name: agentic-systems-engineering
description: Portable guardrails for building, evaluating, and delivering LLM and agentic systems.

interface.shortDescription: Build, evaluate, and deliver reliable LLM and agentic systems.
interface.longDescription: Use Agentic Systems Engineering when Codex needs portable guardrails for prompts, structured outputs, tool use, RAG, agent loops, orchestration, evals, observability, security, cost controls, and delivery practice for LLM-backed systems.
defaultPrompt: Apply agentic systems engineering guardrails to this LLM feature.
Scaffold local evals for this agentic workflow.
Help me evaluate this stochastic system.
